attributes.action: Make a dog injuring or killing a cat a specific offence/public or private  place
attributes.additional_details: I think cats should be considered as a dog or human not. As property.
attributes.background: My cat was attacked by my next door dog and we not sure  going to make  it and nothing  can get done

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Make a dog injuring or killing a cat a specific offence
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756774
